quick_skim.title: A Theoretical Analysis of Memory and Overfitting Phenomena in Stochastic Interpolation Models
quick_skim.abstract: This paper provides a theoretical account of memorization in stochastic interpolation models. By leveraging closed-form expressions for the optimal velocity field and the associated score function, we show that, in the continuous-time oracle setting, both deterministic and stochastic generation processes recover training samples. Under Euler discretization, generated samples remain centered around training samples, with deviations controlled by the step size. We further analyze generation in the presence of estimation errors and show that accumulated estimation errors control the endpoint deviation from the training set. These results imply that the generated sample admits a representation as a training sample perturbed by three controlled terms: a discretization-induced bound, an estimation-error-induced bound, and stochastic Gaussian noise. Based on this characterization, we provide theoretical definitions of overfitting and underfitting in generative models. Synthetic simulations support our theoretical findings.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: theorizes memorization in stochastic interpolation models used for generative modeling
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 理论分析了生成建模中随机插值模型的记忆现象
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 理论分析了生成建模中随机插值模型的记忆现象
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 理论分析了生成建模中随机插值模型的记忆现象
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Provides theoretical analysis of memorization in stochastic interpolation models, relevant to understanding behavior of stochastic bridge generative models.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文对随机插值模型（一类扩散桥）中的记忆和过拟合现象进行了理论分析。通过推导最优速度场和得分函数的闭式表达式，证明在连续时间理想情况下，生成过程会恢复训练样本。离散化后，生成样本围绕训练样本中心，偏差由步长控制。这些结果对基于随机桥的生成模型的可信度和泛化有重要启示。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文对随机插值模型（一类扩散桥）中的记忆和过拟合现象进行了理论分析。通过推导最优速度场和得分函数的闭式表达式，证明在连续时间理想情况下，生成过程会恢复训练样本。离散化后，生成样本围绕训练样本中心，偏差由步长控制。这些结果对基于随机桥的生成模型的可信度和泛化有重要启示。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: stochastic bridge processes for generative modeling
